w:r.w:t: Must fix immediately. Audit risk, data loss, or security vulnerability.
Major functionality gap or UX blocker. Fix within 1 sprint.
Performance, accessibility, or code quality. Fix within 2 sprints.
Polish, i18n, minor improvements. Fix when convenient.
Each task includes exact file location, what to fix, and implementation details.
Add required_evidence_types[] to form schema. Backend API validates before submit_for_review. Frontend shows checklist with check/cross per required doc type. Block closure if any missing.
Backend: compile all records for a WO into single PDF (traveler + FAI + mill certs + inspection + CoC). Frontend: button 'Export evidence pack' in workspace. Use PHP PDF library.
Add sla_deadline field per record type config. Backend cron checks overdue. Frontend shows countdown badge in work queue. Red if overdue. Email notification on escalation.
Backend: evidence_links store + CRUD API. Frontend: 'Related records' panel in workspace. Bidirectional linking. Click-through navigation between linked records.
Add mandatory verification step after corrective action. Due date field. Trend comparison (before vs after). Verification approval gate. Block CAPA closure without verification.
Config per record type (retention_days). Auto-flag when expired. Legal hold capability. Frontend: retention schedule display in admin. Warning badge on records near expiry.
Backend has 4 APIs (upload_quarantine, upload_verify_quarantine, upload_accept, upload_reject). Need frontend panel: list quarantined files, preview metadata, Accept/Reject buttons with reason.
AllocationTracker.checkDuplicate() exists but never called. Add check in allocate flow: before issuing, call record_id_check_duplicate. If exists, show warning with existing record details.
When SOP/WI revision changes, auto-create training assignments for roles listed in document's roles_allowed. Backend trigger on document approval. Frontend: training queue in work dashboard.
Add checkboxes to work queue pending items. Toolbar: 'Approve selected', 'Export selected'. Batch API call. Progress indicator.
Context fields not locked after allocation
User can allocate NCR for SO-001 then change context to SO-002 in form. Fix: make context fields read-only post-allocation. Show lock icon.
Only serial signature chain works. Add approval_mode: 'parallel' and 'any_of_n' to schema. Frontend: show multiple approvers side-by-side. Backend: check if any/all signed.
Exception queue missing date range + status filter
User sees all exceptions. Add: date picker (from-to), status filter (all/upload_error/blocked/rejected). Combine with existing days selector.
History table sorts alphabetically, not chronologically
Date column sorted as text, not Date objects. Fix: parse dates in sort comparator. Use Date.getTime() for numeric comparison.
Lookup fields don't cascade on selection
Selecting customer doesn't auto-filter Part Number list. Call _applyContextSelection() or re-mount dependent lookups when parent value changes.
Clearing SO deletes JO+WO, but clearing JO doesn't clear WO. Make cascade consistent: each field clears all subordinates.
form.online property might not be set when auto-download triggers. Add explicit check: if(form.online === false) before setTimeout.
_normalizeAllocationResponse creates different shapes. Sometimes resp.allocation exists, sometimes resp.record_id is top-level. Standardize: always use top-level fields.
Order link fails but form submit succeeds. User thinks link happened. Track link status, show warning toast if linkage failed.
Changing dept filter resets page to 1 even if user was on page 3. Only reset page when search query changes.
E-signature buttons enabled when module missing
User can click sign button if ESignature not loaded. Disable all signature buttons if window.ESignature is undefined on init.
No file size validation before upload
Large files fail silently. Check file.size vs max upload limit (e.g., 50MB). Show clear error: 'File too large (X MB). Maximum: 50 MB'.
prompt() for reject/reopen reason — poor UX
Native browser prompt() — can't cancel after typing, can't format text, no validation. Replace with proper modal dialog with textarea + cancel/confirm buttons.
Work queue API errors silently swallowed
.catch returns {ok:false} with no user feedback if evidence_get_pending or upload_exception_queue fails. Show error toast and retry button.
If API hangs 30s+, file stays 'pending' forever. Add timeout: auto-set status to 'error' after 60 seconds. Show retry button.
Button stays disabled forever if network dies mid-upload. Add timeout and show retry button.
No error message if both data loads fail
UI shows empty state with no explanation. Show inline error: 'Could not load record types or master data. Check connection.'
Stale cache: loadWorkQueue loaded=true on failure
If API returns ok:false, loaded is still true. Next call returns cached empty data. Fix: set loaded=true only when ok===true.
Workspace state not cleared on form switch
Switching Form-A to Form-B keeps Form-A fieldValues. Clear ws.fieldValues={}, ws.signatures={} when form changes.
Event listeners never unsubscribed. Memory leak on long sessions. Implement .off(event, callback) and call on module unmount.
Old draft keys accumulate in localStorage
Orphaned drafts grow after many allocations. Add cleanup: delete drafts older than 30 days or when count > 50.
Module-level variables not reset on re-render
_selectedDept etc. persist between mounts. Reset at start of _renderRecordIdGenerator.
No loading state when switching forms
UI freezes 1-2s while loadAllocations() runs. Show skeleton loader or spinner in workspace area.
No debounce on multi-file upload inspection
5 files = 15 API calls simultaneously. Queue inspections with max 3 concurrent. Show progress: '3 of 5 verified'.
Preview card missing suggested filename for offline forms
User allocates offline form but doesn't see expected filename. Add filename preview to the preview card.
Work queue cards don't highlight record ID
Record ID buried in card. Make it larger, monospace, prominent at top of each card.
Lookup fields show no loading spinner
User clicks, nothing for 2s. Show spinner while SearchableInput data loads.
File status badges overlap on mobile
'Verified' and 'Warning' badges overlap on small screens. Add flex-wrap to container.
Copy button feedback is minimal (toast only)
Change button text to 'Copied!' for 1 second then revert. More immediate feedback than toast.
Must manually click refresh. Add optional polling every 60 seconds with toggle switch.
Shell grid no mobile layout for <768px
Sidebar overlaps workspace on phone. Add: @media(max-width:768px){.ec-shell{grid-template-columns:1fr}.ec-sidebar{display:none}} + mobile toggle button.
Workspace padding causes horizontal scroll on mobile
Signature grid min-width 220px breaks on phone
Offline amber too light. Change to: background:#fed7aa;color:#92400e for better contrast.
Toast positioning fixed at bottom-right only
Change <aside> to have role='navigation' aria-label='Form catalog'
History table search has no label
Add aria-disabled='true' when .locked class applied. Screen readers don't announce disabled state.
Select elements missing label for= association
<label> text exists but no for= attribute pointing to select id. Add matching for= attributes.
Form field labels missing for= attribute
<label class='ec-label'> doesn't have for='ec-f-fieldId'. Screen readers can't associate label with input.
Can't tab to dropzone or press Enter to open file picker. Add tabindex='0' and keydown handler for Enter/Space.
Mode badge text fails WCAG AA contrast
Gray on light bg. Darken text or add darker backgrounds. Minimum 4.5:1 ratio.
Screen readers don't trap focus. Add role='dialog' aria-modal='true' to overlay.
filterForms() runs every keystroke, no debounce
500 forms x 5 chars = 2500 operations. Add 300ms debounce on search input.
Live search re-renders full table per keystroke
Add 200ms debounce on AllocationTracker table search.
Master data + orders + schema all load in parallel
If master_data_snapshot is 10MB, 3 large requests fire at once. Consider sequential loading with priority.
7 SearchableInput instances created even if not all visible
Only mount lookups for fields present in current schema. Lazy-init on focus.
Table sort blocks main thread for large datasets
Sorting 1000+ rows freezes UI. Use requestAnimationFrame or limit visible rows to 50 with pagination.
Password via prompt() visible in plaintext
prompt() shows password. Replace with modal having <input type='password'>. Ensure HTTPS. Never log password.
If server returns HTML error, .json() fails silently. Check r.ok and content-type header before parsing.
createTextNode is safe for text content but not for attributes with quotes. Review all data-* attribute generation.
User could bypass strictSelect and inject custom value. Add server-side validation in form_fill_submit_online.
Some exception types show English when UI is Vietnamese. Add Vietnamese translation for all 7 types.
'1234 bytes' should use Intl.NumberFormat. Also convert to KB/MB with locale-aware formatting.
Use Intl.DateTimeFormat(lang) for locale-aware dates. Americans expect MM/DD/YYYY.
Server draft save error not shown to user
saveDraftToServer failure is silent. Show warning toast: 'Draft not saved to server. Local copy only.'
userHasApproveRole() defined in 09b AND similar logic in 09-online canSeeAllWorkQueue(). Extract to shared utility.
Same filter/map pattern repeated per source. Refactor to config-driven: LOOKUP_CONFIG[source] = {collection, filters, mapFn}.
Table sort O(n log n) on main thread
For 1000+ rows, use setTimeout(0) to defer sorting or show loading indicator during sort.
Inconsistent HTML generation (string concat vs template)
Mix of 'str' + var and backtick templates. Standardize on one approach for consistency.
API response normalization handles both old/new formats
If backend returns both formats, normalization may break. Add version field check or explicit format detection.
Downstream code may not handle null. Add console.warn when allocation not found for debugging.
